mechanics.excerpt: Bonus Tralts: Stigma /Hedonistic Path Restrictions: Military service mandatory in the Magistracy; SO characters must choose either Military Academy Military Enlistment in Stage 3. THE CLANS understand the Clans, one must understand its two most basic groups: the warrior caste that rules and the other castes that serve.
